steps.expected: Foreign and missing IDs produce the same masked `400 User not found` contract, and audit assertions for foreign targets pass.
steps.observed: Maven exited 0 with `Tests run: 17, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0`; the log shows `User not found` for foreign and missing IDs across force-reset, status, suspend, unsuspend, mfa/disable, and delete paths.

steps.expected: The audit proof should assert `ACCESS_DENIED` metadata with reason, tenant scope, target user ID, and target company code for foreign existing users.
steps.observed: The targeted method awaits denied audits after each privileged action, and `awaitPrivilegedUserDeniedAudit` asserts `reason`, `targetUserId`, `tenantScope`, and `targetCompanyCode` metadata for the `ACCESS_DENIED` event.

evidence.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 17, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0.
evidence.observedResponses: Masked `VAL_001` / `User not found` responses were logged for both foreign and missing user IDs on all privileged admin endpoints exercised by the targeted suites.

assertions.title: No unscoped lock / no blocking on foreign row

steps.expected: With a foreign row lock held, lock-taking endpoints should still return the masked missing-user response within the test timeout, and non-locking endpoints should remain non-blocking.
steps.observed: Maven exited 0 with `Tests run: 1, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0`.

steps.expected: The test should hold a foreign-row write lock and assert bounded-time masked responses for suspend, unsuspend, mfa/disable, delete, force-reset, and status.
steps.observed: The test acquires a row lock with `holdUserRowWriteLock(...)` and uses `executeWithTimeout(..., Duration.ofSeconds(2))` to verify masked responses for all six endpoints without blocking.

evidence.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 1, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0.
evidence.observedResponses: The command log shows masked `User not found` application errors for suspend, unsuspend, mfa/disable, delete, force-reset, and status while the test remained green under the bounded timeout.

steps.expected: Regression suites should be tagged `@Tag("critical")` and not tagged `flaky`.
steps.observed: `AdminUserSecurityIT` and `AuthPasswordResetPublicContractIT` are tagged `@Tag("critical")`; no `@Tag("flaky")` annotation was found in either file.

steps.expected: The auth/admin regression suites should be explicitly included in `pr-fast` and `gate-fast`, and no quarantine entries should exclude them.
steps.observed: `erp-domain/pom.xml` explicitly includes `**/modules/admin/AdminUserSecurityIT.java` and `**/modules/auth/AuthPasswordResetPublicContractIT.java` in both `pr-fast` and `gate-fast`; `scripts/test_quarantine.txt` contains no quarantined tests.

steps.action: Run `bash scripts/gate_fast.sh` from the repo root.
steps.expected: The gate should exit successfully and emit the required `artifacts/gate-fast/` evidence.
steps.observed: The script exited 0 and ended with `[gate-fast] OK`.

steps.expected: `catalog-validation.json`, `flake-guard.json`, and `changed-coverage.json` should be present, with changed-coverage accepted when compatibility mode applies.
steps.observed: All required artifacts were emitted. `catalog-validation.json` and `flake-guard.json` report `passes: true`; `changed-coverage.json` reports `passes: false` with `vacuous_reason: coverage_skipped_files`, and the gate log explicitly says it continued in compatibility mode before reporting OK.

steps.expected: The check should pass and emit the high-risk auth/admin enforcement path.
steps.observed: The script exited 0 and logged `[enterprise-policy] high-risk paths changed; enforcing R2 enterprise controls` followed by `[enterprise-policy] OK`.

steps.expected: The packet diff should include high-risk auth/admin and governance files that justify the R2 enforcement path.
steps.observed: `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` includes `docs/approvals/R2-CHECKPOINT.md`, `erp-domain/pom.xml`, `erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/admin/AdminUserSecurityIT.java`, and `erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/auth/AuthPasswordResetPublicContractIT.java` among the branch changes.

evidence.result: Exit 0; logged `[enterprise-policy] high-risk paths changed; enforcing R2 enterprise controls` and `[enterprise-policy] OK`.

steps.expected: The wrapper and its sub-checks should complete successfully.
steps.observed: The script exited 0 and the log shows `knowledgebase-lint`, `architecture-check`, `enterprise-policy`, and `orchestrator-layer` all completing before `[codex-review-guidelines] OK`.

evidence.result: Exit 0; wrapper completed `knowledgebase-lint`, `architecture-check`, `enterprise-policy`, and `orchestrator-layer` before reporting `[codex-review-guidelines] OK`.

steps.expected: The checkpoint should include `Scope`, `Risk Trigger`, `Approval Authority`, `Escalation Decision`, `Rollback Owner`, `Expiry`, `Verification Evidence`, plus explicit `Mode` and `Human escalation required` lines.
steps.observed: The checkpoint contains all required sections; `Approval Authority` includes `Mode: orchestrator`, and `Escalation Decision` includes `Human escalation required: no`.

steps.expected: The checkpoint update should be part of the packet diff.
steps.observed: `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` includes `docs/approvals/R2-CHECKPOINT.md`, confirming the checkpoint file is part of the branch diff.

frictions.description: `AuthTenantAuthorityIT` full-class execution is known to have unrelated failures on this branch, so validation used only the milestone-relevant targeted method per mission guidance.
frictions.resolution: Used `AuthTenantAuthorityIT#tenant_admin_cross_tenant_privileged_user_actions_mask_foreign_targets_as_missing_and_still_audit_denials` together with the targeted admin suite instead of running the full class.

frictions.description: `artifacts/gate-fast/changed-coverage.json` reported `passes: false` with `vacuous_reason: coverage_skipped_files` because of the known compatibility-mode changed-files coverage behavior on this broad branch diff.
frictions.resolution: Accepted the run because `bash scripts/gate_fast.sh` explicitly continued in compatibility mode and still finished with `[gate-fast] OK`, while the required artifacts were emitted.

summary: Tested 7 assertions on the `jvm-tests` surface: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Targeted tenant-admin boundary tests passed, merge/policy/governance gates passed, and the gate-fast evidence artifacts were emitted with changed-coverage accepted in compatibility mode.
